Omo you dey mad? Your village people don finally send you come internet to embarrass yourself. E don do for you.
The audacity of this one sha. You woke up, looked in the mirror, and still decided to come here. Respect for the confidence, but nothing else.
Your destiny helper took one look at you, collected refund, and took the next flight to Abuja. Can you blame am?
You be the type wey go send 'wyd' at 3am to someone wey don block you on six different platforms. Ode.
Your CV get more gaps than your front teeth. Your future don already write 'not available' when your name show up.
Even your phone dey autocorrect your name to 'mistake'. The machine don know wetin your mother never accept.
You look like someone wey go lose a debate with agama lizard and still go home feeling like professor. E don do.
Your ancestors are in a meeting right now. The agenda is you. Nobody is speaking in your defense.
Bro you get the energy of someone wey go reach heaven gate and God go say 'wait, which one are you again?' Tufiakwa.
Your village don call emergency meeting because of you three times this year alone. You be full-time problem.
The way your life dey go, even Google Maps cannot find your destiny. It just dey show 'route not available'.
You dey carry yourself like premium product but you dey sell for Onitsha market price. Nobody is buying.
Your matter don reach the level wey your guardian angel submit resignation letter with immediate effect.
See this one. You resemble the kind of person wey go miss bus, blame the bus, and call it oppression. Ngwa bye.
Your future called. It said it needs more time. It has been saying this since 2019. We don dey wait.
